ChangeNotes.Value: v1.2.0 - Local models are now a built-in backend (experimental, asked for by testers): pick Local in Mod Options and the NPCs think through LM Studio (default, localhost:1234) or Ollama running on your own machine - free, private, no API key, nothing leaves your PC. Set the exact model id your server serves and the context length you loaded it with; the connection check tells you plainly whether it worked, including 'is your local server running?'. Honest expectations: the model must carry native tool calling (worth a try: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B instruct, GPT-OSS-20B, Mistral Small 24B), you want a 12-16+ GB VRAM GPU and 32 GB RAM, and replies are slower - the chat window (hotkey O) handles the wait far better than face-to-face. Local requests get up to 5 minutes; leaked think-blocks are stripped and a model that thinks without speaking is called out in log.txt with the fix. Cloud setups are untouched.
